title: When assurance is required for pilot, I want stack security evidence prepared and sovereign gates recorded, so auditors can trace claims without blocking IR
job: Execute SECaaS friction items and maintain sovereign register after human approval
situation: Pen-test window, WAF apply, IRSA review, or SOC 2 readiness checkpoint
motivation: GR-T2 pilot and master audit require parallel assurance track (`blocksIR: false`)
expectedOutcome: Security friction witness green; sovereign approvals recorded; pen-test evidence path documented
painPoints: Sovereign approval mistaken for vendor completion
Security work conflated with product app security
Open P0 SEC-PENTEST-01 while waiting on procurement countersign
opportunities: Kickoff prep doc before vendor window
acceptanceCriteria: `pnpm secas:friction:check:write` documents open P0 with owner and next action
Class S items link evidence JSON and coordination seal
Pen-test prep artifacts exist before claiming pen-test complete
nonGoals: Agent signing vendor SOW or auditor MSA
Blocking engineering on EXT-INF-013 pilot owner selection
